moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Final Day
moments.blurb: The climax of the biggest football tournament in the world, the FIFA World Cup 2026, takes place today in East Rutherford, New Jersey.

angles.name: Final Match Build-up
angles.copy: It's the day the world has been waiting for! The FIFA World Cup 2026 Final is TODAY. Who will lift the trophy?

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: The biggest game in football is just hours away. Are you ready for the World Cup Final drama?

angles.name: Post-match reflection
angles.copy: History made! What a World Cup Final we've just witnessed. Congratulations to the champions!

moments.title: The Open Championship 2026 Final Round
moments.blurb: The world's oldest golf tournament, The Open Championship, concludes its 154th edition today at Royal Birkdale, Southport.

angles.name: Who will win?
angles.copy: It's the final day at Royal Birkdale! Who will conquer The Open and claim the Claret Jug today?

angles.name: Golfing Drama
angles.copy: Tension is building on the course at The Open Championship. Every shot counts as the world's best battle for glory.

moments.title: Latitude Festival 2026
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, known for its diverse music, arts, and comedy lineup, continues its run this weekend at Henham Park, Suffolk, wrapping up today.

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: It's the final day of Latitude Festival! Who's had an amazing weekend soaking up the music, arts, and comedy at Henham Park?

angles.name: Best Moments
angles.copy: What's been your highlight from Latitude Festival 2026? So many incredible acts and experiences this weekend!

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart was updated on Friday, revealing the nation's biggest tracks and a potential new number one.

angles.name: New Chart #1
angles.copy: The new Official UK Singles Chart is in! Has your favourite track made it to number one this week?

angles.name: Chart Climbers
angles.copy: Who's climbing the Official UK Singles Chart this week? Discover the biggest movers and shakers!

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama
moments.blurb: The popular reality dating show Love Island UK continues to entertain audiences with its daily drama and villa antics.

angles.name: Last Night's Episode
angles.copy: Did you catch Love Island last night? We need to talk about that bombshell! What do you think will happen next?

angles.name: Favourite Couple
angles.copy: Who's your favourite couple in the Love Island villa right now? Are they in it for the long haul?

moments.title: Brian May's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary Queen guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

angles.name: Queen's Sound
angles.copy: Celebrating Brian May's 79th today! His unique sound is unmistakable. What's the first Queen song that comes to mind?

moments.title: Carlos Santana's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: The influential guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his unique blend of rock, blues, and Latin rhythms, turns 79 tomorrow.

angles.name: Guitar Master
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the legendary Carlos Santana turns 79! Get ready to celebrate with some classic tracks.

angles.name: Timeless Hits
angles.copy: Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow! What's your go-to Santana track?

moments.title: Don Henley's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder of the Eagles and successful solo artist, will celebrate his 79th birthday on Wednesday.

angles.name: Eagles Voice
angles.copy: On Wednesday, Don Henley of the Eagles turns 79! Which Eagles song with his vocals is your favourite?

angles.name: Solo & Band
angles.copy: Celebrating Don Henley's 79th on Wednesday! From the Eagles to his solo hits, what's his best work?

moments.title: Slash's 61st Birthday
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses legendary lead guitarist Slash, celebrated for his iconic top hat and blistering riffs, turns 61 on Thursday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Next Thursday, the legendary Slash turns 61! Get ready to crank up some GNR in honour of the guitar icon.

angles.name: GNR Anthems
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to Slash on Thursday! Which Guns N' Roses anthem features his most unforgettable solo?

moments.title: Mick Jagger's 83rd Birthday
moments.blurb: The inimitable frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, known for his electrifying stage presence and enduring rock legacy, celebrates his 83rd birthday on Sunday.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger turns 83 on Sunday?! The man is pure rock 'n' roll energy. What's your favourite Stones track?

angles.name: Enduring Energy
angles.copy: Mick Jagger is 83 on Sunday and still moving like Jagger! What's the most iconic Rolling Stones performance you've seen or heard?

moments.title: Geddy Lee's 73rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Rush's iconic vocalist and bassist Geddy Lee, a progressive rock pioneer, will turn 73 next Wednesday.

angles.name: Prog Rock Legend
angles.copy: Next Wednesday, the incredible Geddy Lee of Rush turns 73! What's your favourite Rush album?

angles.name: Unique Sound
angles.copy: Celebrating Geddy Lee's 73rd next Wednesday! His distinctive voice and bass playing shaped a genre. What's your favourite Rush song?

moments.title: UK Summer Holidays in Full Swing
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are in full swing across the UK, bringing longer days, family trips, and hopefully some sunshine.

angles.name: Holiday Plans
angles.copy: The summer holidays are here! What are your plans for making the most of the long days and warm evenings?

angles.name: Summer Vibes
angles.copy: It's officially summer holiday season! What's your favourite thing about this time of year in the UK?
